title: every transaction gets a page
body: paste any txid — in search, or from any timeline — and land on its own page: which smart coins it touched, what was born, moved or retired, the cells it created and spent, the decoded token actions, and a one-click replay of the real spend through Kaspa's actual script engine. older workers still answer with the coin links; nothing breaks.

title: friends check each other's math
body: a new consistency endpoint cross-checks kascov's token accounting against other independent ecosystem indexers, automatically — token counts, supplies, the lot. differences usually mean one of us has a bug; we fix ours and share theirs kindly.

title: verified from the chain — not asserted
body: the accounting layer: every KCC20 token's history replayed, supply conservation checked, every live balance cryptographically proven against its commitment. 258 of 270 tokens verified, 0 invalid, the rest honestly marked with reasons. token pages show holders, classified mint/transfer/burn timelines, and the proof.

title: the galaxy glows and the front page breathes
body: coins are glowing orbs now, clusters are nebulae, the map sits on a parallax starfield — and the landing page's blockDAG is a living simulation: blocks born at kaspa's cadence, linking to parents, drifting like time. all of it pauses the instant you look away, so it costs nothing.

title: the mainnet galaxy tells the truth
body: small networks now show their actual coins — glowing dots with their shared-transaction links — instead of two giant summary bubbles hiding four covenants. click a dot, get the coin.

title: the chain has names now
body: the decoder learned genesis0, PURE and KCC20 from the chain's own revealed programs — thousands of covenant runs went from anonymous hex to real contract names, decoded and re-checkable by anyone.

title: the first open KCC20 token directory
body: every covenant token on the network in one table — owner and amount decoded straight from chain state, honestly badged "decoded, not validated" until the accounting layer proves them. plus USD context on mainnet and event filters everywhere.

title: an API worth building on
body: a cursorable event feed for the whole network, batch coin lookups, webhook secrets with signed deliveries, a live KAS price endpoint — and a builders guide at /guide: deploy, spend, replay in 15 minutes.

title: find, follow, replay
body: search all coins by name, id or contract from any page; coin pages update live as events land; and any real spend replays through Kaspa's actual script engine, opcode by opcode.

title: every coin link is a billboard
body: share a coin anywhere and it unfurls into a live picture card — name, avatar, holdings, story. plus a sitemap, so search engines can finally find the coins.

title: the big-network wave
body: the galaxy streams in tiers (big clusters first, the rest behind), the grid paginates instead of downloading everything, and quiet tabs stop refetching — kascov now scales past 168k coins without breaking a sweat.

title: analytics · the network at a glance
body: births against retirements over the whole history, coins by contract type, a survival curve, and the indexer's own reorg ledger — every chart drawn from the same feeds the page already serves.

title: make a smart coin without writing code
body: pick a covenant, fill in the parties and amounts in plain terms, and deploy it on testnet-10 in one click — byte-perfect script assembled in your browser, no toolchain.

title: a page for every coin
body: coin pages no longer depend on the loaded grid window — deep links, galaxy clicks and shared URLs resolve straight from the indexer, for all 168k+ coins.

title: the galaxy
body: the whole network on one zoomable map — every app at once, each dot a smart coin, each link a shared transaction. scroll to zoom, click a dot to open its life story.

title: kascov.io
body: the explorer gets its own front door — old links forward, share cards re-rendered, canonical everywhere.

title: first outside hands
body: community pull requests land — bug fixes from strangers and the covenant workbench unified into one playground. open source doing its thing.

title: the workbench wave
body: what-if spend simulation, cryptographically verified contract source, a visual script debugger, a ZK proof-verification panel, and payload lanes — the tools a covenant developer actually needs, in the browser.

title: contracts RUN now
body: deploy a real covenant, spend it, watch the program reveal itself on-chain permanently — plus escrow settlement, multi-contract app families, and a mission-control redesign with the BlockDAG as the hero.

title: stories get honest
body: multi-piece coins tell their true story, truncated histories get archival repair, "retired" is reserved for the story-ending burn — and a contract generator so you can make one yours.

title: the scale rework
body: the monolithic snapshot era ends: paginated grid, address pages, a live SSE event stream, template analytics and a daily digest. kascov stops being a demo.

title: coins learn to speak
body: friendly names, life stories, spend-time decoding that captures the program a covenant actually ran, and SilverScript recognition by skeleton — byte-identical, not guesswork.

title: day one
body: an acceptance-driven covenant indexer, a post-Toccata script disassembler, a lifecycle lab CLI, a live Cloud Run worker and a dashboard — kascov goes from empty repo to watching testnet-10 breathe, in one day.
